intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把语言误判的动作顺序、沉默和最后一句问题读清楚。

sentences.text: I had an amusing experience last year.
sentences.focus_zh: amusing experience 要连成一个整体，表示一件轻轻好笑、后来能讲出来的经历。

sentences.text: After I had left a small village in the south of France, I drove on to the next town.
sentences.focus_zh: had left 表示更早发生；south of France 是法国南部，长地点短语要稳稳读完。

sentences.text: On the way, a young man waved to me.
sentences.focus_zh: On the way 给出途中；waved to me 是向我挥手，引出后面的误会。

sentences.text: I stopped and he asked me for a lift.
sentences.focus_zh: asked me for a lift 是英式说法，意思是请我让他搭一段车。

sentences.text: As soon as he had got into the car, I said good morning to him in French and he replied in the same language.
sentences.focus_zh: As soon as 引出动作先后；had got into the car 先发生，replied in the same language 推动误会。

sentences.text: Apart from a few words, I do not know any French at all.
sentences.focus_zh: Apart from 是除了；at all 放在否定里加强语气，说明他几乎不会法语。

sentences.text: Neither of us spoke during the journey.
sentences.focus_zh: Neither of us 强调两个人都没有开口，把一路沉默读出来。

sentences.text: I had nearly reached the town, when the young man suddenly said, very slowly, "Do you speak English?"
sentences.focus_zh: had nearly reached 表示快到镇上；very slowly 后面的 Do you speak English? 是全课笑点。
